mapper.select: select tool_name as toolName, description, require_admin as requireAdmin, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from zephyr_builtin_tool_controls order by tool_name
mapper.insert: insert into zephyr_builtin_tool_controls (tool_name, description, require_admin, created_at, updated_at) values (#{entity.toolName}, #{entity.description}, #{entity.requireAdmin}, #{entity.createdAt}, #{entity.updatedAt})
